name: 🦇 ༉ ₊˚ . Gotham
description:
˗ ˏ 𝘚𝘪𝘤 𝘗𝘢𝘳𝘷𝘪𝘴 𝘔𝘢𝘨𝘯𝘢 ˊ ˗ City of sin, crime, wealth. City of disgrace. Over the years, Gotham City has taken on various nicknames, marked by its history and its inhabitants. For years, innocent citizens lived in terror, surrounded by criminals, until a man, a vigilante, appeared: Batman. His mask is a symbol. Some fear it, but for others it brings hope.

[edit: I deleted the character I invented in the starting story because the bot gave it too much importance]
